info.name: Temenos Wealth API
info.description:
Integrated portfolio management and securities trading platform APIs for wealth managers and private bankers. Provides enterprise APIs across holdings, inventory, order, party, reference, meta, and system categories for managing portfolios, executing trades across a wide range of instruments from fixed income and equities through ETD and OTC derivatives to structured products and fund types.

Contact Support:
 Name: Temenos Developer Support
 Email: api.support@temenos.com
